name: Upside-Down Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Devil's Food cake mix (for 2-layer size)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the miniature marshmallows in a greased 13-by-9-inch pan.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the brown sugar, cocoa powder, and hot water until well mixed.
3. Add three-quarters of the chopped walnuts to the mixture.
4. Pour the mixture over the marshmallows in the pan.
5. Spoon the cake batter from the package over the mixture.
6. Sprinkle the remaining chopped walnuts on top.
7. Bake for 45 to 50 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Remove from the oven and turn out of the pan. The cocoa-nut-marshmallow topping will have baked under the batter, resulting in chocolaty richness.
